summary: The change fails closed for absent per-account measurements, excludes unknown accounts from eligible capacity, persists and surfaces an explicit probe outcome, and covers both the degraded-capacity behavior and malformed probe markers with non-vacuous self-test assertions. The workflow condition handles materialization, self-test, and probe failures without publishing a successful marker, while still allowing the dashboard to render visibly degraded. No trust check is weakened, no untrusted text is expanded into workflow execution, and no token-shaped data is exposed by the changed paths.
